title: ononis angustissima var. falcata
intro: Ononis angustissima var. falcata, also known as the Narrowleaf Restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The Narrowleaf Restharrow has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used as an ingredient in some herbal remedies and supplements.
